PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Barton Gale appearing for petitioner. Contest filed. Counsel has filed an answer to the will contest. Counsel has not heard from the contestant. Contestant is not in court to pursue the contest. Contest is denied as insufficient on its face. Will admitted to probate. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Continued To May-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARNACES:BARTON GALE FOR HELENA HURD;ELIZABETH SCURLOCK IN PRO PER. MS SCURLOCK REQUEST A ONE MONTH CONTINUANCE SO THAT SHE CAN OBTAIN COUNSEL. MR GALE DOES NOT OBJECT. THE MATTER IS CONITNUED TO MAY 15, 2006. JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CLERK;ROSIE NOGUERA
